props.title: Big win this week
props.body: Enterprise tier went live on schedule. First 12 customers migrated; zero support escalations in 72 hours.

steps.title: Enterprise SSO (SAML 2.0)
steps.body: Shipped Monday. Okta, Azure AD, and Google Workspace tested. JIT provisioning working for Okta only — JIRA-1820 filed for Azure.

steps.title: Audit log export (CSV + SIEM)
steps.body: Shipped Wednesday. Splunk and Datadog integrations verified by 3 beta customers.

steps.title: Edge cache warming
steps.body: p99 render latency dropped from 410 ms to 118 ms on EU-West. Continuing rollout to APAC this weekend.

steps.title: Mobile app alpha (iOS)
steps.body: SwiftUI shell done. Renderer WebView loading outprint output. Offline mode stubbed. Beta target: May 19.

steps.title: Streaming partial renders
steps.body: Design doc in review. Unblocked once edge cache is fully rolled out.

steps.title: Component catalog v1.1 shipped
steps.body: CountdownTimer, ERDDiagram, and Swimlane GA. Catalog.md and spec/catalog.json updated.

steps.title: Theme: Supabase
steps.body: Dark-native emerald theme merged and live. 5 themes total.

steps.title: Prompt guidelines v3
steps.body: Updated SKILL.md with Canvas-first examples and multi-HTML linking pattern. Merged to main.

steps.title: Scroll-jack slide mode
steps.body: SlideDeck gets a new scroll-jack mode (sticky scroll + IntersectionObserver). Tests green.

steps.title: Benchmark vs. GPT-4o HTML output
steps.body: Token-cost comparison on 12 real use-cases. Draft ready for review.

props.title: ADR-09: Canvas as default render mode
props.body: Accepted. All new agent outputs default to canvas template unless parts[] is present. Page mode remains fully supported for one-shot documents. Rationale: canvas builds a persistent thread of outputs rather than orphaned files — better agent UX long-term.

steps.title: Finish APAC edge cache rollout
steps.body: Owner: infra team. Due: Sunday May 4.
